target.description: Company or business to analyze unit economics for

model_type.description: Business model hint: saas, marketplace, ecommerce, fintech, hardware, or auto-detect

description: Business model breakdown — structures known/estimated unit economics (CAC, LTV, margins, payback) with sourced vs. estimated flagging
usage: unit economics, business model, CAC LTV, margins, revenue model, how do they make money, monetization, profitability
